name: Upload Sidebar Link
notes: Rendered as a <li> element inside Sidebar's sections.map() at line 44; section id is 'upload', label is '⬆️ Upload'.
onClick calls the onNavigate prop with 'upload', which resolves to App.handleNavigate and sets activeSection='upload' in App class component state.
Active-state styling (navItemActiveStyle: darker background #0f3460, white text) is applied when the activeSection prop equals 'upload'; otherwise navItemStyle is used.

Clicking the link does NOT switch the main content area — App.jsx always renders DocumentGrid regardless of activeSection; the Upload link is a visual-only selection with no corresponding upload-specific content panel.
